name: Chal Jhooti
overview: Mini habitually uses small lies to avoid life's complications. One such fib leads her mother to believe she is a lesbian. To avoid an awkward confession, Mini agrees to the lie, despite being secretly in love with a guy. She soon realizes this major deception is about to turn her life upside down.
